### Self-Review Checklist

- [ ] PR label set <!-- major, minor, patch -->
- [ ] Corresponding documentation added or updated
- [ ] I have checked whether this PR has merge conflicts, and resolved them if they're present
- [ ] I have checked for any remaining `todo` comments and either addressed or removed them before marking this PR as ready for review
- [ ] I have checked my code for any unfinished or placeholder work and either clearly documented why it remains or removed it
